user.title: Set up Navimow
user.description: Enter a name to identify this Navimow account.

auth.title: Link Navimow Account
auth.description:
Please click [this link]({auth_url}) to log into your Segway Navimow account.

Once completed, this window will close or update automatically.

error.invalid_code: Unable to extract the authorization code.
error.auth_failed: Authentication failed: unable to retrieve the token.
error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to Navimow servers.

abort.already_configured: An account with this name is already configured.
